object_a.label: wall feature
object_a.description: white baseboard molding along the bottom of walls
object_a.long_form_open_description: Continuous white-painted baseboard molding where walls meet the hardwood floor. Runs along left and back walls and visible in foreground; typical 3-4 inch profile.

object_b.label: wall feature
object_b.description: white baseboard molding running along walls
object_b.long_form_open_description: Continuous white painted baseboard molding (~10 cm tall) where walls meet the hardwood floor; crisp joint to floor and slightly beveled top edge. Runs along left and right walls visible in the scene.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: Directly beneath the sailboat painting and along the length of the hallway, meeting the floor.
